C implementation and build script for decoding PNG/APNG images with license terms and header definitions.


## Files
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License terms for using, altering, and redistributing the software with attribution requirements.
- **[upng.c](upng.c.md)**: A C implementation for decoding PNG and APNG images, including functions for handling image metadata and errors.
- **[upng.h](upng.h.md)**: Header file for uPNG library, defining structures and functions for decoding PNG and APNG images.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the uPNG library as a static library in the pebble-firmware project.
